description_long: This is a traditional detached house with a gable roof and an attached single-story extension. The main structure features a steep, dark gray roof with two chimneys and white plastered walls, accented by a wooden gable on one end. Multiple windows are symmetrically arranged on the main facade, while the extension has a flat, weathered roof and a covered patio area with visible greenery and outdoor furniture. The property is surrounded by a well-maintained lawn, shrubs, and a small garden, giving it a rural or suburban character. The house sits on a slightly raised foundation with stonework visible at the base. The overall appearance suggests a cozy, lived-in residence with a blend of wood, plaster, and stone materials.
description: A traditional gable-roofed house with white plaster walls, wooden accents, and an attached single-story extension, surrounded by a green lawn and garden.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the main gable facade, white walls, wooden gable, and the attached extension with a patio and garden.
description_view_1: Rear aerial view highlighting the roof layout, chimneys, and the backyard with greenery and outdoor furniture.
description_view_2: Side view focusing on the extension's flat roof, covered patio, and the rear windows of the main house.
description_view_3: Back view displaying the long side of the house, symmetrical window arrangement, and the sloped terrain around the foundation.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a simple door, small steps, and a covered patio area adjacent to the extension.
